narrative:
Miami Township has 34,696 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
